Media3.notes: Media3 1.10.0 focuses heavily on Modern UI/Compose improvements, format support, and modularity. It introduces a new Player Composable (an out-of-the-box modern widget with customizable controls), a ProgressSlider (for dragging/tapping seeks), and PlaybackSpeedControl. Extended format support includes extracting Versatile Video Coding (VVC) tracks and Dolby Vision Profile 10 in MP4 containers.

CameraX.notes: Version 1.6.0 is a major architectural milestone. CameraX now uses CameraPipe, the same modern, high-performance camera stack that powers the official Google Pixel camera app. The VideoCapture API now integrates the Media3 Muxer by default, improving video encoding, saving, and overall stability. The CameraXViewfinder composable now works flawlessly with Jetpack Compose's Pager.

WindowInsets.notes: Starting in Android 15, edge-to-edge display is mandatory. Apps can no longer opt out; they must actively handle WindowInsets to apply padding to top and bottom UI elements. Core 1.16.0 includes fixes for edge-cases on older devices (API 29 and below) where WindowInsets were not correctly dispatched to sibling views.
